subject: A young dancer in ornate gold coin-and-chain attire with teal-toned long hair adorned with pink roses, hand raised near her face in a coy pose
description: An anime-style illustration of a young female dancer figure with long teal hair decorated with pink rose flowers. She wears a gold coin-and-chain midriff outfit with a flowing pale sash, jewelry visible at her wrists and torso. Her right hand is raised near her face in a playful, coy pose, and her expression is open-mouthed and expressive. A large ghosted close-up of her face appears in the background behind the main figure, emphasizing facial detail. The overall palette is warm gold and green tones against a pale card background.
foreground: Young dancer figure in gold and teal costume, coy raised-hand pose
background: Ghosted large close-up face echo of the same character, pale green card background
emotion: Playful and coy; open mouth, hand raised near face, flirtatious energy
